snippet.title: Wafa Na Raas Aayee Song Jubin Nautiyal Ft.Himansh K,Arushi N, Meet Bros|Rashmi V|Ashish P| Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Wafa Na Raas Aayee" in the voice of Jubin Nautiyal, music by Meet Bros, lyrics are written by Rashmi Virag. The song features Himansh Kohli, Arushi Nishank & Rohit Suchanti. The video is directed by Ashish Panda. 
Hit 'LIKE' if you ♥ this song.

Get ready for #WafaNaRaasAayee to pinch your heart and stir your emotions.

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 3 | Positive Approach Rakh Yaar
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

The next Episode Releases on 28th April, when we reach 9M Subscribers.

Preparing for UPSC is challenging. It tests not only your knowledge but also your patience. It’s really important to maintain a positive approach throughout your preparation. But everyone around Abhilash notices that he lacks a positive approach in his personality, which reflects in his answers too. How will Abhilash cope with it? Will he be able to keep his approach positive?

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #87: 23.72% of the total UPSC Aspirants wanted to become IAS officers because they wanted to be called “Babu” so that finally someone will ask them “Mele Babu ne thana thaya?”
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants​ #TVFOriginal​ #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC​

snippet.title: 6 Women Products That You Should Stop Using Immediately (With Healthier Alternatives)
snippet.description:
6 Daily Products That Women Should Stop Using Immediately (Switch to healthier alternatives)

Buy Mamaearth C3 Face Mask -    https://bit.ly/2YoOVxu
(Apply code FITTUBER21 to get 21% off)

To all the ladies out there, I wish to share with you 6 Products that you should stop using immediately. These 6 products are extensively marketed as essentials and are a part of daily life of almost every woman today. During the research of this video, I was shocked to know that they pose some serious health hazards. We will discuss why they are so damaging and how to switch to healthier alternatives which too are available and affordable. 

00:52  - #6 Product that women should stop using immediately. This is one product that companies are desperately trying to make you believe in as an essential woman care.
02:26 - #5 Product that women should stop using immediately. Have you read the list of warnings written on it? Because if you had, you would soon start hunting for safer options. 
04:47 - #4 Product that women should stop using immediately. Hiding behind those glossy colors and fruity names is a harmful mix of toxic chemicals.
06:14 - #3 Product that women should stop using immediately. I wonder why it is extensively marketed as a miracle drink for women health?
07:26 - #2 Product that women should stop using immediately. Misleading ads of big giants propel women to use these products in the name of hygiene.
08:50 - Dishonourable Mention
09:05 - #1 Product that women should stop using immediately. The problem is that most commercial ones are talc based.

snippet.title: സന്തോഷ് ജോർജ് കുളങ്ങരയുടെ പൈതൃക കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ 125 - 250 വർഷം പഴക്കമുള്ള കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾ പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ
snippet.description:
കേരളത്തിന്റെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന് വാങ്ങിയ, 125 മുതൽ 250 വർഷം വരെ പഴക്കമുള്ള വീടുകളും എട്ടുകെട്ടുകളും വൈക്കത്തിനടുത്ത് ഒരു ദ്വീപിൽ സന്തോഷ് കുളങ്ങര പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ കേൾക്കുക.. A Story of Kerala Palace 
Part 1: https://youtu.be/6h8M2_HZ8uw

Instagram: www.instagram.com/baijunnair
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com

snippet.title: Thee Veeran | Hiphop Tamizha Documentary
snippet.description:
Narrated by Hiphop Tamizha, this documentary sheds light upon the life of Tamil Nadu Fire Fighters of India. This voyage has changed our perspective on life. At dire times like this, amidst the pandemic, we wish this effort of ours will sow seeds of hope upon the barren souls who are feeling downcast. There is always hope if we know where to look for. In our case, we found that in our year-long journey filled with Passion, Bravery and Sacrifice. Witness the journey unfold.

Writer-Director - Hiphop Tamizha
Music Producer by  HiphopTamizha
Executive Producer - Ashwanth
Singer - Nivas 
Background Score Programming - Fazil sha
Sound Engineer - Nikhil Mathews
DOP - Arjun Raja D.F.Tech
DOP Assistant - Dany Pops
Editor - Deepak.S.Dwaraknath
Colorist - Siva
Design - Nxtgen Studio
Social Media Manager - SriramSurathKumar
Hiphop Tamizha Staff - Parthiban, Nishanth 

In association with Tamil Nadu Fire Rescue & Services 

A Tamizhanda Movement Initiative.

Like us on - http://www.facebook.com/hiphoptamizha​ 
Follow us on -Instagram - http://www.instagram.com/hiphoptamizha​
Twitter - http://www.twitter.com/hiphoptamizha

snippet.title: The Weeknd & Ariana Grande - Save Your Tears (Remix) (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official music video by The Weeknd & Ariana Grande performing "Save Your Tears" (Remix), available everywhere now: https://TheWeeknd.lnk.to/SYTRMX

►Subscribe to The Weeknd on YouTube: http://theweeknd.co/subscribeYD 
►Get exclusive merch: shop.theweeknd.com 
►Follow The Weeknd: 
https://twitter.com/theweeknd
https://www.facebook.com/theweeknd
https://www.instagram.com/theweeknd 
https://www.theweeknd.com 

Production Company: Blinkink @blink_ink
Director: Jack Brown - @jbanimation
Executive Producer: Josef Byrne @philipphlop 
Producers: Matt Marsh, Dom Thompson-Talbot & Sami Goddard
Storyboard Artist: Sav Akyüz @splitwigs

Design:
Pete Sharp @petesharp.universe
Dexter Maurer @dextermaurer
James Neilson @jamesxneilson

Character Design: Jack Brown - @jbanimation

Animation:
Anita Gill @_anitagill
Andrew Khosravani @andrew_khosravani
Ed Smith @boxbeatrobot
Katherine Spangenberg @katiediazz.art
Gaurav Wakankar @gwakankar
Maki Yoshikura @maki_animation
Michael Towers @michael.towers
Nikunj Patel @spiralofsorts
Thomas Knowler @knowlerdraws

Compositors:
Jonathan Gallagher @grasptheview
Paul Cheshire @paul_cheshire
Adriano Vessichelli @adrianovessichelli

Editor: David Toba @ediztor

Lyrics:
THE WEEKND
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better
THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
I don’t know why, I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

#TheWeeknd #ArianaGrande #SaveYourTearsRemix

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: THE DEVIL MADE ME DO IT – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
True horror returns. Based on the case files of Ed and Lorraine Warren. #TheConjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, in theaters and HBO Max June 4.
 
https://www.facebook.com/TheConjuringMovie
https://twitter.com/TheConjuring
https://www.instagram.com/theconjuring
https://www.theconjuringmovie.com
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” reveals a chilling story of terror, murder and unknown evil that shocked even experienced real-life paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing & First Look - True Ultra Flagship SuperPhone - Giveaway🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Enter here: https://gleam.io/YPfBy/tg-mi-11-ultra-giveaway
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse baat ki hai Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone ke baare mein aur share ki hai kuch details isi Mi 11 Ultra Smartphone ke baare mein aur saath hi isi Mi 11 Ultra ki ek Unboxing aur details share ki hai. Mi 11 Ultra ek flagship phone hai Xiaomi ki taraf se jaha hai 6.81" ka WQHD+ AMOLED 120Hz Display, Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai ek Triple Camera setup 50MP Primary Camera + 48MP Ultrawide Camera + 48MP 5x Zoom (120x Zoom) Camera ke saath mein. Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai 20MP Selfie Camera aur power ke liye hai liquid cooled Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 5G Processor, aur saath mein 8GB/12GB RAM LPDDR5 RAM aur 256GB/512GB UFS3.1 Storage aur saath mein 5000mAh ki Battery 67W wired/wireless charging ke saath mein jaha 10W reverse wireless charging bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone mein hamare paas hai WiFi 6E, 5G multilink aur NFC option bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra phone aap mein se kisi ek lucky viewer ko milne waala hai. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko Mi 11 Ultra 5G ki yeh unboxing video pasand aayegi.   

Mi 11 Ultra Price in India: 
12GB + 256GB = 69,999INR

snippet.title: Covid-19: Oxygen Express leaves for Maharashtra from Visakhapatnam
snippet.description: Oxygen Express with 100 tonnes of medical oxygen left for Maharashtra from Visakhapatnam. Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited (RINL) tweeted, " The first ‘Oxygen Express’ train loaded with 100T of liquid medical oxygen has left for Maharashtra from Visakhapatnam Steel Plant. RINL stands with the nation in these trying times."

snippet.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
snippet.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

Rolling Credits

CAST AND CREW:
Abhinav Singh, Abhishek, Abhishek Pandey, Adarsh Jaiswal, Ajay Sharma, Akshay Kumar Jha, Aman, Aman Mishra, Anu, Ashish Dubey, Bharat Bhushan, Hema Mukherjee, Jaggan, Junaid, Kamni, Kunal Jai Singhani, Lalit Chauhan, Maurya Agarwal, Mohit Gupta, Narabh Shah, Neeraj Arora, Nidhi, Nikunj Goyal, Pooja Gupta, Pooja Sharma, Prajat Singh, Prajjwal Soni, Prateeksha, Pratham Raheja, Renu, Sarthak Goyal, Shivangi, Shivansh, Shubham Mittal, Sidhanth Rajput, Subhash Ray, Sunil, Vikas Singla, Vrinda Chugh

Songwriter & Singer: Kunal Jai Singhani

Music Credits: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WbY9LxGkPyY 

Vocals Recorded by and at: Shubham Mittal at Artoday Studio - Delhi

Mixed and Mastered by: Shubham Mittal

VIDEO CREW:
Director: Utkarsh Bharat
1st Assistant Director: Shubham Mittal

Director of Photography (DOP): DD Verma

2nd unit DOP: Sanjay Kumar Jena

Editor: Shubham Mittal

Lightman: Parmendar Kumar Shah, Amit Yadav

Camera Assistant/ Focus Puller: Gaurav Rawat

Location  
Day 1 - (Sharma Niwas Girls PG): S/87 school block Shakarpur 

Day 2 - (AVJ House Boys PG): S 452A school block Shakarpur 

MARKETING AND PROMOTIONS:
Pooja Sharma, Vrinda Chugh, Neeraj Arora, Dheeraj Thukral, Shubham Mittal, Kunal Jai Singhani, Divya Garg

hi.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
hi.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

snippet.title: GROWING OP TOOLS FOR LOGGY BIRTHDAY | MINECRAFT
snippet.description:
GROWING OP TOOLS FOR LOGGY BIRTHDAY | MINECRAFT

Today is Loggy's birthday in our minecraft city, but i forgot to buy him a present. I decided to make a cake and give him some diamonds for his birthday but then that is not enough this is when I find a super cool item which can let me grow OP tools. I had to plan something and i found a secret way of crafting the ore seeds. I created an ore farm which will grow op tools from diamond and gold too. Let me know which item was your favourite.

• Facebook - https://facebook.com/chapatihindigamer

Nav Haryanvi Presenting "Loot Liya (Lyrical Video)" a New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021. Sung by Khasa Aala Chahar. Starring with Khasa Aala Chahar and Sweta Chauhan. Music Given by Ghanu Music. Penned by Khasa Aala Chahar. This Video Directed by Ameet Choudhary. Music Label by Nupur Audio.

#LootLiya #YaarTeraFullPapiHai #KhasaAalaChahar #SwetaChauhan #AmeetChoudhary #NewHaryanviSongsHaryanavi2021

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

ओय लूट लिया र लूट लिया ओय दिन धोले तने लूट लिया ओय तू चंबल की डाकू से तने दिल धोले मै लूट लिया

Nandhana palace the pillar of expertise Stan's as an indentity for hospitality and a symbol of bontifulness.
Foucsing on dely tasty yet healthy food, We use the finest of the ingredients to serve the richest of the taste and spread most of the joy. Our best restaurants in Bangalore has brought in a consolidated and delectable Andhra cuisine along with creating an eating experience that is cherished for long 30 years and counting .Nandhana Palace restaurant is the first name that comes to the mind of visitors when they visit Bangalore City and locals a like when it comes to authentic Anthea food.

Nandhana restaurant is a group of fine dining Andhra restaurant with 15 branches in the top localities all across Bangalore . striving to multiply the ethnicity of food cluture environment and taste Nandhana spreads its wings into providing extravagant banquet delicious 😋 sweets comfortable accommodation and much more .Here at Nandhana we have attempted to connect all the dots of hospitality.No wonder it is know for its best Andhra cuisine in Bangalore.

snippet.title: Apple AirTags Unboxing & Demo!

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3151 - Jethalal Visits Bhide's House! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya

Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 904 | 22nd April, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 904: The Milk Misery
------------------------------------
 Jetha rushes to a nearby milk shop. He stands there in a queue and when his turn comes, there is no milk in the container. As Jetha gets upset the seller says that he can get the milk in five minutes. But when Jetha gets the milk he realizes he does not have the money. The seller says that he can't take the milk without paying. So, then he calls Abdul with money, and both return to Gokuldham.
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

------------------------------------
 Jetha rushes to a nearby milk shop. He stands there in a queue and when his turn comes, there is no milk in the container. As Jetha gets upset the seller says that he can get the milk in five minutes. But when Jetha gets the milk he realizes he does not have the money. The seller says that he can't take the milk without paying. So, then he calls Abdul with money, and both return to Gokuldham.
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Why Should Straight Couples Have all the Trouble?
snippet.description:
Since the beginning of time, lovers have had to struggle to let their love be recognized by either their family or the society- whether it was Romeo and Juliet or Heer and Ranjha. In our new video we ask a very important question- while we have recognized and glorified straight love stories, what about love between people of the same gender? Isn't it time to give same-sex relationships the same recognition? In this video we look at one such same-sex couple looking for recognition of their relationship but in their own humorous way.

snippet.title: Ritik Left Tsg ? - Where Is He Full Reason
snippet.description:
Be Safe & Stay Home 

#Twosidegamers

To prevent the spread of COVID-19:
📍Clean your hands often. Use soap and water, or an alcohol-based hand rub.

📍Maintain a safe distance from anyone who is coughing or sneezing.

📍Wear a mask when physical distancing is not possible.

📍Don’t touch your eyes, nose or mouth.

📍Cover your nose and mouth with your bent elbow or a tissue when you cough or sneeze.

📍Stay home if you feel unwell.

📍If you have a fever, cough and difficulty breathing, seek medical attention.

snippet.title: Maharashtra Lockdown : आज रात्री 8 पासून नवी नियमावली, नियम मोडल्यास 50 हजारांचा दंड
snippet.description:
#Lockdown #Coronalatestupdate #MarathiNews #News18Lokmat #LiveMarathiNews #मराठीताज्याबातम्या
 कोरोना (Corona) संसर्ग तोडण्यासाठी अखेर 'ब्रेक द चेन' म्हणत राज्यात लॉकडाऊनचा  (maharashtra lockdown)  निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे. आज रात्री 8 वाजेपासून लॉकडाऊनची अंमलबजावणी होणार आहे. राज्य सरकारच्य नव्या नियमावलीनुसार,  सर्व सामान्यांना लोकलने प्रवास करता येणार नाही. तसंच, जिल्हाबंदीही घालण्यात आली आहे.'ब्रेक द चेन' अंतर्गत दि. 22 एप्रिल 2021, रात्री 8 वाजेपासून पासून लागू होणारी सुधारित नियमावली राज्य सरकारकडून जाहीर करण्यात आली आहे. कोरोना विषाणू फैलाव रोखण्यासाठी आणि संसर्गाला प्रतिबंध करण्यासाठी काही आपत्कालीन पावले उचलणे अपरिहार्य झाले आहे.
Subscribe our channel for latest news updates:
http://bit.ly/38Oki8c

For all the latest news from Maharashtra Government Formation live  , keep watching News18 Lokmat LIVE TV on YouTube.

News18 India’s leading News Network, and the Lokmat Group, Maharashtra’s leading Newspaper group, present News18Lokmat (formerly- IBN-Lokmat ) - a 24-hour Marathi News and Current Affairs Channel. The legacy of these two renowned media powerhouses will give News18Lokmat a sense of immense credibility as well as access to a vast audience base. Going on air from April 6, News18Lokmat will be a world-class credible News channel for the highly aware and conscious ‘Progressive Marathi’.


न्यूज 18 इंडियाचे अग्रगण्य न्यूज नेटवर्क आणि लोकमत ग्रुप, महाराष्ट्राचे अग्रगण्य वृत्तपत्र समूह, सध्याचे न्यूज 18 लोकमत (पूर्वीचे आयबीएन लोकमत) - 24 तासांचे मराठी न्यूज आणि करंट अफेयर्स चॅनल. या दोन प्रसिद्ध मीडिया पॉवरहाउसची वारसा न्यूज 18 लोकमतेला प्रचंड विश्वासार्हतेचा तसेच मोठ्या प्रेक्षकांच्या आधारावर प्रवेश देईल. 6 एप्रिलपासून हवाला जाणे, न्यूज 18 लोकमत जागृत आणि जागृत 'प्रोग्रेसिव्ह मराठी' साठी जागतिक दर्जाचे विश्वासार्ह न्यूज चॅनेल असेल.


Visit our official Website for latest news & updates: https://bit.ly/321zn3A

Follow us On Twitter: https://twitter.com/news18lokmat?lang=en

Like us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/News18Lokmat

Subscribe to our channel:  https://www.youtube.com/user/IBNLokmattv
tags: Maharashtra Imposes Stricter Covid Norms; Groceries
Essential Shops Open Only From 7 am to 11 am

न्यूज 18 इंडियाचे अग्रगण्य न्यूज नेटवर्क आणि लोकमत ग्रुप, महाराष्ट्राचे अग्रगण्य वृत्तपत्र समूह, सध्याचे न्यूज 18 लोकमत (पूर्वीचे आयबीएन लोकमत) - 24 तासांचे मराठी न्यूज आणि करंट अफेयर्स चॅनल. या दोन प्रसिद्ध मीडिया पॉवरहाउसची वारसा न्यूज 18 लोकमतेला प्रचंड विश्वासार्हतेचा तसेच मोठ्या प्रेक्षकांच्या आधारावर प्रवेश देईल. 6 एप्रिलपासून हवाला जाणे, न्यूज 18 लोकमत जागृत आणि जागृत 'प्रोग्रेसिव्ह मराठी' साठी जागतिक दर्जाचे विश्वासार्ह न्यूज चॅनेल असेल.

mr.title: Maharashtra Lockdown : आज रात्री 8 पासून नवी नियमावली, नियम मोडल्यास 50 हजारांचा दंड
mr.description:
#Lockdown #Coronalatestupdate #MarathiNews #News18Lokmat #LiveMarathiNews #मराठीताज्याबातम्या
 कोरोना (Corona) संसर्ग तोडण्यासाठी अखेर 'ब्रेक द चेन' म्हणत राज्यात लॉकडाऊनचा  (maharashtra lockdown)  निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे. आज रात्री 8 वाजेपासून लॉकडाऊनची अंमलबजावणी होणार आहे. राज्य सरकारच्य नव्या नियमावलीनुसार,  सर्व सामान्यांना लोकलने प्रवास करता येणार नाही. तसंच, जिल्हाबंदीही घालण्यात आली आहे.'ब्रेक द चेन' अंतर्गत दि. 22 एप्रिल 2021, रात्री 8 वाजेपासून पासून लागू होणारी सुधारित नियमावली राज्य सरकारकडून जाहीर करण्यात आली आहे. कोरोना विषाणू फैलाव रोखण्यासाठी आणि संसर्गाला प्रतिबंध करण्यासाठी काही आपत्कालीन पावले उचलणे अपरिहार्य झाले आहे.
Subscribe our channel for latest news updates:
http://bit.ly/38Oki8c

For all the latest news from Maharashtra Government Formation live  , keep watching News18 Lokmat LIVE TV on YouTube.

News18 India’s leading News Network, and the Lokmat Group, Maharashtra’s leading Newspaper group, present News18Lokmat (formerly- IBN-Lokmat ) - a 24-hour Marathi News and Current Affairs Channel. snippet.description:

Episode 3150 : Gokuldham Most Awaited Surprise
---------------------------------------------------------
Gokuldham Family has been eagerly waiting for the clock to strike 11. All the members of the Gokuldham society receive a link. The link is full of surprise. Everyone is happy and have no control on their emotions. To know more watch the full episode.
More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com

Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
Welcome To Aditya Movies 

Follow and Enjoy The Latest Hind Dubbed movie "A AA" Part 4 On Aditya Movies. Starring Nithiin, Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran Directed by Trivikram.

#AAAHindiDubbedMovie #AAAScenes #NithinLatestMovies #SamanthaMovies #AnupamaParameshwaran #AdityaMovies

Film Name: A AA
Director: Trivikram
Producer: Umesh Gupta
Actor: Nithiin
Actress: Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran
Banner: Aditya Music India Pvt.Ltd.

A Aa Movie Synopsis:

Anasuya (Samantha) is a docile young woman who wants to break free from the clutches of her control-freak mom (Nadiya). While her mom is gone on a business trip, Anasuya sneaks up to the village of her maternal uncle. Vihari (Nithin) is Anasuya’s brother-in-law and he hosts her. Vihari’s wedding is already fixed with another girl. Anasuya’s mom gets her a wedding alliance. Rest of the story is all about the issue between these two families and how Anansuya Ramalingam and Anand Vihari unite at the end.

snippet.title: Talja (Official Video) Jassa Dhillon | Deepak Dhillon | Gur Sidhu | New Punjabi Song 2021| Above All
snippet.description:
Brown Town Music Presents Official Video of Latest Punjabi Song of 2021 Talja By Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon From His Debut Album Above All.



Track Credits:
Track Name: Talja
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Deepak Dhillon
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Female Lead: Navi Brar
Edit & Colour Grading: Gobindpuriya
DOP: Renato Villas
Story/Screenplay: Garry Bhullar Films
Assitant Director: Paramvir
Make Up Artist: Parteek Dhillon
Bike Stunts: MSL Productions
BTS: Gundeep
Directed By: Japjeet Dhillon
Supporting Artists: Param Sandhu, Nirvair Sandhu & Lovely
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Special Thanks: Big Media
Hair Stylist: Varinder 8261
Lyrical Video:  Roop Kamal Singh
Producer: Nav Sandhu
Label: Brown Town Music
Team Believe: Shilpa Sharda & Srikant Seshadri





Online Promotions: BTown Media Entertainment
Instagram: https://instagram.com/btownmediaa​​​​​​



Do Share your feedback in comments.
Don't Forget to Subscribe Brown Town Music : http://bit.ly/subscribebrowntownmusic​​​




Talja Lyrics:

Oh baby bass rehando na lado,
mere husan de dushmna naal ,
Ehh jmaana jaalim ha,
te jaalim he rehna aa,
Oye aah kachjiya ambiya ta ma chabb k khaju , 
dekhi chall banda ki alet lene saare mai,
bicho paad du mere saale de,
 
 
Forda de toachan vargi yaari , 
ho peju pind  tere te bhari,
o vigdya jatt te jhota same
Kardu raga cho garmi saari ,
naal jo mere ohh bande agg , 
ptandar lott layinde ne thagg ,
roj da yabb  tu giriya chabb ho,
Dekh njaare ni ,
 
 
la sharta yara tera thoke te bade swaare ni , 
je kahe bna dya scene ma hune dabaare ni,
 
 
O talja o talja o talja talja talja
Talja talja ve badmasha, 
awe hoju koi tamasha ,
ve kato jaan dukhan vich pauni ,
Ve Koi la k rakh du passa ,
katt la rabb toh thoda dar k ,
thode ghot sabar de bharke,
sare pind di akh vich radke  , 
ve fadya jayega , 
awe velly banda banda ragya jayega ,
awe velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
Aah hukam de ike dukke  ni,
tere jatt de muhre fikke ni ,
on flasha hon kude,
rahinde saah vairi de khiche ni  ,
mast aa rahindi  chaal ,
lafdya nal kadiye laal ,
kai takkre  velly  mittra nu, 
sada vinga v na vaal , 
baba naal te khidya maal , 
te aun  hulaare ni ,
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade swaare ni ,
j kahe bna dya scene ma hune dbaare ni,
 
Begaane putt hoye aa juttt , 
ve raat pawayega,
Aah patlo da dil kehnda,
tu att krayega ,
Shant shaant  k pauna,
ve jatta kurte kaale ,
chaklo chaklo kahinde,
jo pattu rakhda naale , 
tu ik te vairi bahle
Mud pachtayega ,
ve tu velly banda banda ragdya jayega
 
 
 
 
Pura tohra dhakad shora ,
ni zigre  bamb kude,
Aah rees jatt di laude,
ni jaane hamb kude
Tohna chakde roj he,
gode thale laa dya ge
Tu bol pyaar de bol  , 
hune puga dya ge
 
 
Toba toba , 
teriya galla ve,
toba toba tere karaar ,
na ishq tere vich bhora , 
ve sare auto e ne hathiyaar, 
din ne chaar te lammi car , 
sirre kuj laayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega ,
jatta velly banda banda ragdya jayega,
 
 
la sharta yaar tera thoke te bade sware ni.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1225 & 1226 | Recap
snippet.description:
After learning about Heer's devious plan, Virat decides to marry Nayan at the earliest. On the other hand, Harman asks Soumya to go out with him so that he prove himself. Will Soumya agree to go out with him?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

The accuracy, completeness, currency and/or suitability of the above video description is not endorsed by its licensor or broadcaster or the Channel. They shall not be liable for loss and/or damage arising from the video description.

snippet.title: Indians During IPL ||  NazarBattu
snippet.description:
Win Rs. 1 Cr as first prize!!  Beat VVS Laxman & get a chance to win 5X. Download now and get 1500 Rs joining bonus and 20% extra cash. Hurry, make your team now  : https://www.my11circle.com/influencer-com.html?utm_source=m1c_IM_Direct_Adziny&utm_medium=video_20cb&utm_campaign=YT_Influencer_IND_21042021&utm_content=Nazarbattu

IPL is a festival season in India. We celebrate the IPL season like every other festival. Cricket is a religion and now it has a festival named after it. We are stuck at home due to the corona pandemic and IPl is here to entertain us.
There are funny ways in which we celebrate IPL. We prepare a lot, we miss the office, we lie to our friends and family to watch IPL match. We all have our favorite players and team and we fight over it if someone questions our selection. 
In this video, we show different types of people during IPL. We have picked some of our funniest IPL experiences and converted them into a video. 
We tried to cover every aspect of IPL, hope you love this video. Share the video with your friends and family.
#IPL2021 #t20

snippet.title: MADHANYA - Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar | Asees Kaur |Lijo-DJ Chetas| Anshul Garg | Wedding Song 2021
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Madhanya by Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur featuring Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar. 


Singer: Rahul Vaidya & Asees Kaur
Music: Lijo George & Dj Chetas
Lyrics: Kumaar
Song Produced by Lijo George
Mixed and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge
Assistant engineer: Pukhraj
Vocals recorded at Soundideaz & Click Studios
Recording Engineers : Kittu & Rupak
Featuring: Rahul Vaidya & Disha Parmar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Video Director - Rajan Bir 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Co - Director - Anmol Randhawa 
Choreographer - Sahil Sharma 
Assistant Choreographer - Rajat 
Editor - Gaurav K Mehra 
Di - Onkar 
Styled by - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Jib operator - Manish Arora
Line producer  - RS films and production 
Makeup - Rajan Passi
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Madhanya Lyrics : 

Beetein saare mausam
Babul tere ghar mein
Ab chale pav mere
Piya ke shehar mein (2)

Ho Tune Vidayiyan kaise
Likhi Marjaaniyan
Kaise bataye O Rabba
Sahi naiyon jaaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye o mere babula teriyan
Mithiyan yaadan
Mere peeche peeche auniyan haaye
Haaye o mere babula Meriya
Hun gudiyan
Kol tere reh jaaniyan haaye

Kuch bhi nahi hai tere
Kadmon se aage (2)
Tujhse jo baandhe maine
Tootenge na dhaage (2)

Haath mera thaama tune
Teri Meherbaaniyan
Mere naam ab se teri
Saari Pareshaniyan

Madhaniyan
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye
Haaye ve mereya daadya rabba
Kinna jamiya kinna ne lai janiya haaye




#Madhanya #RahulVaidya #DishaParmar

snippet.title: Last Ride in My Bumble Bee🥺 - Last Vlog - Irfan's View
snippet.description:
#BMW #LastRide #irfansview

Last ride in My Bumble Bee!!!! I did not know this will end this soon. This car, seriously one of the Best creation of man. The real driver pleasure felt while driving this beauty. I have never driven a car like this and in future I don't know whether I will get a car like this. It is such a beauty which will take us to any place without any difficulties while we travel on it.

snippet.title: Rabb Manaya | Karan Sehmbi | Neha Thakur | Official Music Video | New Song 2021
snippet.description:
True love stories never have endings... 

Saregama Originals presents "Rabb Manaya" a love song by "Karan Sehmbi"... 

Song Credit: 
Song: Rabb Manaya
Singer: Karan Sehmbi
Music Composer: Rox A
Lyrics: Bilas

Curated By: Deepak Kumar
Project By: Avinash Pandey
Project Head: Shweta Slathia
Special Thanks: Rai Saab

Video Credits
Video By: Tru Markes
Directed By: Disher Singh & Khushpal Singh
DOP: Gagan Randhawa
Edit, Colorist & VFX: Sohi Saini
Karan Hairstyle: Ali khan

#SaregamaMusic​
#RabbManaya​
#KaranSehmbi

Lyrics:
Ve main qismat de naal larhke, is jagg nu dushman karke 
Haye rabb manaya tainu paun lai...
Loki si barha kujh kehnde, 
Mainu tahne mehne dende 
Jis din da hath tera farya
Mainu vaang paglaa vehnde 
Khud roi main ik tainu hasaun lai... 

Hook- ve mai qismat de naal larhke is jagg nu dushman karke, haye rabb manaya tainu paun lai, sab kujh chadya main tainu chaun lai... 

1- main ta tainu ehna chaya
Har tha te tainu paya
Bolke ki akhaan main 
Je tainu nazri na aya...
Ki ni kita main tere tak aun lai...
(Hook)

2- kasam mainu teri ve
Na murh kade avangi 
Je tu mainu chadya ta
Haye main marjavangi
Sach ae bilas gal jhooth na jaanlai
(Hook)

Label:: Saregama India Ltd.

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com

Follow us on:

YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/saregamamusic

Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregama

Twitter: https://twitter.com/saregamaglobal
